meaning: n.宪法,构造,体质,体格,国体,章程,惯例
examples: A new constitution was promulgated last month.
The assembly was mandated to draft a constitution.
The constitution invested him with certain powers.
European leaders could do worse than study our Constitution, particularly the provision for the Senate.
Fighting to protect and uphold the U.S. Constitution even means defending those we can't stand.
